summary: Deliverable incomplete; critical files missing. Script is well-designed with good error handling and testable dependency injection. However: workflow references non-existent test file (test_license_checker.py), fixtures (fixtures/*.json/.txt), and config (license_config.json); no act-result.txt artifact capture or external test harness to orchestrate multiple act runs as required; confusing exit-code patterns in lines 33-37 && lines 47-50 (&&exit 1||echo); script lacks Python type hints; TDD approach not demonstrated (no failing test provided first). Core script logic sound, but integration incomplete.
